rows.label: qev090805_MSG0001
rows.name: Did you meet with Pulala?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090805_MSG0002
rows.name:
I taught her the trick to
getting favors out of H.B.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090805_MSG0003
rows.name:
I hope it worked. I know you'll do
a good job of helping her out.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090805_MSG0004
rows.name:
Welcome back, H.B. Did you
get in touch with Pulala?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090805_MSG0005
rows.name: Yes, we've accepted her request.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090805_MSG0006
rows.name:
However, FrontierNet isn't turning up
any signs of applicable Bias activity.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090805_MSG0007
rows.name:
I thought we'd come back here
to see if you had any leads.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090805_MSG0008
rows.name: Nothing, I'm afraid.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090805_MSG0009
rows.name: I see.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090805_MSG0010
rows.name:
For the time being, it looks
like your only option is to
try and expand FrontierNet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090805_MSG0011
rows.name: But...you're more than capable![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090805_MSG0012
rows.name:
Knowing you, you'll have another dozen
probes down before lunch, am I right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090805_MSG0013
rows.name:
Madam, I am in awe of your perspicacity.
You have a keen eye for talent.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090805_MSG0014
rows.name: Wouldn't you agree?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090805_JNK0010
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: qev090805_SEL0011
rows.name: Concur that Eleonora is correct.

rows.label: qev090805_JNK0020
rows.name: Dismiss

rows.label: qev090805_SEL0021
rows.name:
Say that Eleonora is flattering
H.B. with empty words.

rows.label: qev090805_MSG0015
rows.name:
I am so very blessed to have
colleagues as wise as you two.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090805_MSG0016
rows.name:
I fear you've yet to attain her
level of clarity. I mourn for you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090805_MSG0017
rows.name: Miss Eleonora.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090805_MSG0018
rows.name:
The day I'm named BLADE
commander, you will be my aide.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090805_MSG0019
rows.name:
Gosh, what an offer. Now, enough
playing around. You've got work to do.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090805_MSG0020
rows.name:
I'll retry the search once you've got
those probes down. Come see me then.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090805_MSG0021
rows.name:
Understood. Until then, we'll be performing
our Pathfinder duties to the utmost.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090805_MSG0022
rows.name:
If you can install more data probes
in Nightglow Forest, I should be
able to get you some answers.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090805_MSG0023
rows.name:
Come back and see me once your probe
count is up. I'll be happy to run
another search for you then.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090805_MSG0024
rows.name:
Excellent work, H.B. I've
been waiting for you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090805_MSG0025
rows.name: Have you managed to find our blood-king?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090805_MSG0026
rows.name:
I have. One of the new probes
you installed turned up a hit.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090805_MSG0027
rows.name:
And that takes care of Pulala's request.
So, I have your reward right here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090805_MSG0028
rows.name:
No. I started this mission, and I intend
to see it through until he's defeated.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090805_MSG0029
rows.name:
Uh, you know he's dangerous, right?
Maybe you should notify the Avalanche.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090805_MSG0030
rows.name:
Such thinking is outdated and
foolish. BLADE must stay agile
in these dark times.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090805_MSG0031
rows.name:
You agree of course, yes? Boundaries
between Unions serve no purpose.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090805_JNK0030
rows.name: Wonder

rows.label: qev090805_SEL0031
rows.name:
Ask H.B. if he is really going
to steal a Avalancher job.

rows.label: qev090805_JNK0040
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: qev090805_SEL0041
rows.name: Nod grimly and prepare for battle.

rows.label: qev090805_MSG0032
rows.name:
I've often told Commander
Vandham that his system of
segregated Unions is obsolete.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090805_MSG0033
rows.name:
Those with ability should
be free to exercise it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090805_MSG0034
rows.name:
And now I shall prove just that by
eliminating this blood-king character.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090805_MSG0035
rows.name:
I'm glad I asked you for
help in this matter.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090805_MSG0036
rows.name:
Some BLADEs cling to that obsolete
system of segregated Unions.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090805_MSG0037
rows.name:
Bringing this blood-king to
justice will be yet more proof
that I am correct on this![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090805_MSG0038
rows.name: You're impossible once you get this way.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090805_MSG0039
rows.name:
If the commander heard you say
that, he'd put you in traction.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090805_MSG0040
rows.name:
Still, if you want to continue, I
suppose I can't really stop you...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090805_MSG0041
rows.name:
And I imagine you're up to the task, as
long as the two of you work together.[ST:wait ]
